description: Solowin Holdings, an investment holding company, provides corporate finance, wealth management, virtual assets, and asset management services in Hong Kong. It operates Solomon VA+, a trading platform that allows investors to trade over listed securities and their derivative products listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange (HKSE), New York Stock Exchange, Nasdaq, Shanghai Stock Exchange, and Shenzhen Stock Exchange; and provides online account opening and trading services through its front trading and back-office clearing systems.
